next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: User asks total earned since beginning of Dec 2025 for service line 'workflow mapping and intake audit', answer only a number. Exhaustive check: search for exact phrase found 3 invoice files; broader 'intake audit' search only adds a title line, no extra service-line records. Date filter since 2025-12-01 includes all three issued_on dates (2025-12-18, 2026-01-19, 2026-03-20). Arithmetic from matching line_eur values: 520 + 260 + 420 = 1200.
next_step.observation: Broader invoice search for 'intake audit' returned only the same three service-line matches plus one heading line, confirming no additional matching line items.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and schema guidance, read finance lane AGENTS before invoice reads, and used line-item amounts (not invoice totals) per service-line rule.
function.outcome_justification: The exact service line appears in three read invoices since 2025-12-01 with line_eur values 520, 260, and 420; summed total is 1200.
